info.name: GoodsGo API — Full Test Suite
info.description:
Complete endpoint coverage for GoodsGo backend. Variables are auto-filled by test scripts as you run requests in order.

## Quick Start
1. Import this collection into Postman.
2. Run 'Health Check' first.
3. Run Auth → Register (User A), then verify email (check DB or email).
4. Run Auth → Login (User A) — accessToken is auto-saved.
5. Continue in module order.

item.name: Verify Email (GET link simulation)
item._description:
Fill verifyToken from the email_verifications table:
SELECT token FROM email_verifications ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;

item.name: Verify Email (POST — programmatic)
item._description: Copy token from email_verifications table and set verifyToken variable.

item.name: Refresh Token
item._description: Reads refresh_token httpOnly cookie (auto-sent by Postman). Updates accessToken.

item.name: Reset Password
item._description:
Copy token from password_resets table:
SELECT token FROM password_resets ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;

item.name: Logout
item._description: Run AFTER all tests that need the session. Clears the refresh_token cookie.

item.name: Create Post (User A)

formdata.value: 20-ton truck available for full load, departure Saturday morning.

item._description: Requires email-verified account. Add image files to the 'images' field (optional, max 5).

item.name: Delete Post (User A)
item._description: Run this LAST in the Posts section — it soft-deletes the post. Re-create a new post if needed for Bookings testing.

item.name: Create Booking (User B requests User A's post)
item._description: Ensure postId is set from Posts → Create Post. User B must have verified email.

item.name: Reject Booking (User A)
item._description: Use only for a DIFFERENT booking that is still pending. Do not reject the same booking you accepted.

item.name: Withdraw Booking (User B)
item._description: Only works when booking is still 'pending'.

item.name: Mark In Progress (User A)
item._description: Booking must be in 'accepted' state.

item.name: Complete Booking (User A)
item._description: Booking must be 'in_progress'. Triggers payment auto-release timer and review window.

item.name: Cancel Booking
item._description: Works on 'accepted' or 'in_progress' bookings.

item.name: Raise Dispute
item._description: Only on 'in_progress' or 'completed' bookings. Saves disputeId.

item.name: Get My Conversations
item._description: conversationId is auto-set after Accept Booking. Or set it manually here.

item.name: Create Review (User A reviews User B)
item._description: bookingId must be in 'completed' state. reviewRole: 'owner' (post owner reviewing requester) or 'requester' (requester reviewing owner).

item.name: Delete Review
item._description: Only within the review_edit_window_hours (default 24h from creation).

item.name: Initiate Payment (User B pays)
item._description: Booking must be 'accepted'. Returns Razorpay order details for checkout.

item.name: Verify Payment (after Razorpay checkout)
item._description: Replace the values with those returned by the Razorpay test checkout widget. The HMAC signature must match — use Razorpay test mode.

item.name: Webhook (Razorpay — manual test)
item._description: Always returns 200 (Razorpay retries on any other code). Signature verification will fail unless RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET is set correctly.

item.name: Get Platform Settings (Super Admin)
item._description: Requires super_admin role. The seeded admin may be 'admin' role — check admin_users table.

item.name: Update Platform Setting (Super Admin)
item._description: Requires super_admin role. Key = platform_commission_pct. Revert after testing.
